subject: Joint Distributions
question: Let $N_1$ and $N_2$ represent the numbers of claims submitted to a life insurance company in April and May, respectively. The joint probability function of $N_1$ and $N_2$ is $\Pr(n_1, n_2) = \begin{cases} 3\left(\frac{1}{4}\right)^{n_1-1} e^{-n_1}(1-e^{-n_1})^{n_2-1} & \text{for } n_1 = 1, 2, 3, \ldots \text{ and } n_2 = 1, 2, 3, \ldots \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ Calculate the expected number of claims that will be submitted to the company in May if exactly 2 claims were submitted in April.
